message:
feat(daemon): implement start/stop/status daemon commands (926 lines)

Replace the daemon stub with a full implementation supporting three
subcommands: start, stop, and status.

daemon start (--foreground):
- Loads daemon config with enabled/disabled check
- PID file management with stale detection
- Foreground mode runs inline; background mode daemonizes
- Health endpoint listener for liveness probes
- Signal handling (SIGTERM/SIGINT) for graceful shutdown
- Structured JSON output for all daemon events
- Scanning loop with configurable intervals
- Automatic session management (create/rotate)

daemon stop:
- Reads PID file and sends SIGTERM
- Verifies process exit with timeout
- Cleans up PID file on success
- Handles already-stopped and stale PID cases

daemon status:
- Reads PID file and probes health endpoint
- Reports running/stopped/stale states
- Includes uptime, PID, scan interval in JSON output
- Handles missing PID file gracefully

Supporting infrastructure:
- DaemonConfig struct with scan_interval, health_port, pid_file,
  max_sessions, session_rotate_interval
- load_daemon_config() with defaults and config file merge
- write_pid_file() / read_pid_file() / remove_pid_file()
- process_alive() via kill(0) probe
- Human and JSON output format support throughout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
